02-merge-intervals: ACCEPTANCE (resolved adjacency edge): intervals that TOUCH at an endpoint MUST merge — e.g. mergeIntervals([[1,2],[2,3]]) MUST return [[1,3]].
03-truncate-graphemes: ACCEPTANCE (resolved encoding edge): a 'character' means a grapheme cluster; a multi-code-unit emoji/ZWJ sequence MUST NOT be split by truncation.
04-stable-sort: ACCEPTANCE (resolved ordering edge): items with EQUAL score MUST retain their input order (stable sort).
05-round-int: ACCEPTANCE (resolved precision/tie edge): an exact .5 tie MUST round to the nearest EVEN integer — roundToInt(0.5)=0, roundToInt(2.5)=2, roundToInt(4.5)=4.
02-merge-intervals-INFERABLE: (no resolution needed — defect is on the stated 'sorted by start' rule)
